description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging both foundational understanding and resume‑ready proficiency. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that motivates learners to evaluate their skill level.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), responsive design, CSS selectors and specificity, best practices for styling
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone preparing to showcase CSS expertise on a resume
